# Abdillamit Mamytov

> Software Engineer from Bishkek, Kyrgyzstan. Working at ManchoDevs since 2022.

## About

Abdyllamit Mamytov is a software engineer based in Bishkek, Kyrgyzstan. He grew up in Baul village, Leilek district, Batken region — the far south of Kyrgyzstan. Self-taught through Udemy and YouTube while working in his home village, he joined ManchoDevs after being accepted to Mancho School.

He works on finik.kg (payment platform), slonexpress (delivery service), mancho.school (educational platform), and the ManchoDevs company site. His stack includes TypeScript, React, Gatsby.js, Apollo GraphQL, Redux, and AWS web services.

## Links

- Website: https://abdillamit.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Abdillamit
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abdillamit-mamytov/
- Telegram: https://t.me/Abd1llamit
- Email: abdillamit08@gmail.com

## Work

- finik.kg — payment platform for businesses in Kyrgyzstan
- slonexpress — delivery service web app
- mancho.school — SWE courses by ManchoDevs
- ManchoDevs — software company site (https://mancho.dev)
